title: Japan 2026
description: Travel images from train stations, quiet streets, and bright city evenings.

tokyo-01.svg.title: Station Platform
tokyo-01.svg.caption: Orderly lines and a calm wait for the next train.

tokyo-02.svg.title: Lantern Alley
tokyo-02.svg.caption: A narrow lane lit by paper lanterns at dusk.

tokyo-03.svg.title: Rainy Crossing
tokyo-03.svg.caption: Umbrellas and mirrored reflections in the street.

tokyo-04.svg.title: Temple Steps
tokyo-04.svg.caption: Quiet morning light on worn stone steps.
